title: UTV2-1107 DB-layer picks FSM enforcement trigger proof

fsm_trigger.gap_closed: Gap #9 (INIT-2.3.4): service-role direct UPDATE picks SET status bypassed TypeScript lifecycle guards. Trigger enforces FSM at Postgres storage layer for all roles.
